stemHtml: A private pilot is waiting for a delayed passenger. When they finally depart, the pilot decides to do a checklist from memory instead of actually reading it. In flight, he notices that he has missed an item from the checklist. What is this an example of?

options.a: A knowledge-based error, followed by a slip.
options.b: A rule-based error, followed by a lapse.
options.c: A violation, followed by a lapse.     ​​​​​​
options.d: A slip, followed by a violation.
